## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `dev` (or `main` for hotfixes).
- [ ] I read [`CONTRIBUTING.md`](./CONTRIBUTING.md).
- [ ] I added or updated tests where it makes sense.
- [ ] I ran `bun run check`, `bun run typecheck`, and `bun run test` locally.
- [ ] For UI changes, I attached **before / after screenshots or a short clip**.
- [ ] My commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) with a **workspace scope** (`feat(security): …`, `fix(web): …`).
- [ ] I did not introduce a new dependency, OR I justified the addition in the PR description.
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or PII are committed.
